LAOUADI Mohamed Amin
LAOUADI Mohamed Amin
Grade:Maitre de conferences classe B
Grade:Maitre de conferences classe B

Bureau:19

Mohamed Amin
LAOUADI
is currently an Associate Professor at the Department of Computer Science of the University of Ferhat Abbas Sétif-1 in Algeria.
He holds a Ph.D. in computer science from the University of of Badji Mokhtar, Annaba in Algeria. His main areas of interest include Agent-Oriented Software Engineering, Multi-Agent System and Formal Methods.
